text:
Security audit — 3 issues created:
#7 CSP not configured (CRITICAL)
#8 Insufficient CORS restrictions (HIGH)
#9 API rate limiting not implemented (HIGH)

Starting with #7 CSP.
PR #8 (CSP) merged. E2E tests added. Remaining #9, #10 targeting today.

⚠️ Investigating tenant isolation bug. Customer reports of viewing other users' designs.
Running grep -r 'setTenant\|setTeamId' to audit all locations.

✅ Tenant isolation bug — root cause identified and fixed.
Cause: design-cache.ts cache key missing tenant ID
Fix: cache.get(designId) → cache.get(tenantId:designId)
PR #11 → Merged → Deployed
Tenant isolation bug — all 5 affected customers notified. All acknowledgments received.

All 3 security PRs merged:
- PR #8 CSP ✅
- PR #9 CORS ✅
- PR #10 API rate limiting ✅
All tests pass.

v0.4 pre-release tests complete:
- 142/142 tests pass
- Coverage 83.2%
- p95 = 147ms
No release blockers.
v0.4.0 tag created, CHANGELOG updated. Ready to deploy.
